summary: PR #2072 matched and improved trophy module functions, primarily in src/melee/ty/toy.c, src/melee/ty/tylist.c, and src/melee/ty/tyfigupon.c, with supporting header/type updates and a caller update in ifprize.c for the new un_803063D4 signature. Review focused on replacing raw pointer math and M2C_FIELD-style access with typed structs where justified, avoiding unnecessary casts, keeping string accesses inline, preserving TyModeState usage, and requiring justification for recovered ty/types.h fields.

key_files.role: Primary trophy-module matching work; diff adds implementations or improvements for trophy unlock/data lookup, fog/light animation helpers, toy animation state, DevText display setup, and related helpers.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/ty/toy.c +800/-24

raw_diff: toy.c hunks include un_803053C4, Trophy_SetUnlockState, un_803060BC, un_803062BC, un_80306930, un_80306A0C, un_80306C5C, un_80307F64, un_803082F8, un_80308328, un_80308354, un_803109A0, un_803114E8
text_corpus: bot report lists new matches and improvements in main/melee/ty/toy

what_changed: PR body claims 100% match for 14 functions and improvements on another 15 across toy.c, tylist.c, and tyfigupon.c.

Bot report in loaded text_corpus records matched-code increase of +1832 bytes and lists 10 new matches at that report point, including toy functions un_803060BC, un_803114E8, un_8031234C, un_80306A0C, un_803062BC, un_803082F8, un_80308328, un_80306930; tylist un_80313464; and tyfigupon un_80314B54.
toy.c added typed helper structs such as TyViewData, TyDisplayData, TyLightData in the diff excerpt and implemented multiple previously stubbed trophy/toy helpers.

toy.c implemented Trophy_SetUnlockState and un_803060BC-style trophy table/data lookup logic using Toy, TrophyData, gmMainLib trophy tables, language checks, random unlock values, and event/counter updates.

tylist.c added archive-loading and list-processing code using gmMainLib, lbarchive, lblanguage, and SIS/text includes; review indicated that remaining pointer math and string-offset access needed cleanup.

types.h added or extended trophy-related structs and Toy fields, but review comments asked for justification, so field semantics should be treated as review-sensitive rather than globally accepted solely from this slice.
ifprize.c updated un_802FE918 to call un_803063D4 with three zero arguments.
ftKb_Init.c moved ftKb_Init_804D9570 declaration to ftKb_Init.static.h and kept the Fighter_ChangeMotionState use.
smart_moves: Moved ftKb_Init_804D9570 out of a source-local extern and into ftKb_Init.static.h, aligning declaration ownership with a header rather than a local ad hoc declaration.
Replaced at least one raw M2C_FIELD access in toy.c with a small local typed struct cast: un_803102C4 changed from M2C_FIELD(un_804D6E6C, s8*, 4) to ((TyViewData*) un_804D6E6C)->x4.
Updated ifprize.c at the callsite when un_803063D4 gained a recovered signature, rather than leaving an obsolete zero-argument call.
Used switch form in un_803060BC for field-index dispatch in the diff excerpt, making trophy data lookup clearer than a raw branch ladder.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching trophy/ty code exposes raw global-state offsets, reviewers expected typed state access where an existing or extractable struct is known, rather than M2C_FIELD or byte-pointer math.
evidence_refs: review_comments: tdisplay.c comment says TyModeState should not have been reverted to M2C_FIELD
review_comments: tylist.c comment says fix all pointer math in the file
review_comments: tylist.c asks whether a struct can be extracted for HSD_SisLib_804D1124[0] + 0x4E8
decomp_standards: typed-fields-over-pointer-math

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered structs and added fields in shared headers need local justification; matching pressure alone was not enough for reviewers to accept names/layouts such as ToyAnimState, TrophyData, trophyTable, or trophyCount without evidence.
evidence_refs: review_comments: types.h asks 'are we confident about this? What's our justification?'
review_comments: types.h asks same for x19C, trophyTable, and trophyCount
decomp_standards: conservative-naming
decomp_standards: typed-fields-over-pointer-math

decomp_lessons.lesson: String-table or archive symbol accesses should not stay as arbitrary string-base-plus-offset expressions when the source-level inlined string can be used.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan says 'Fix up these string accesses to use the inlined string'
review_comments: PsiLupan says 'Same as previous. Fix up string accesses'
decomp_standards: no-string-literal-symbol-regression

decomp_lessons.lesson: Signature recovery has cross-file fallout: when a ty function signature is recovered, known callers such as ifprize.c must be updated in the same PR or follow-up.
evidence_refs: pr_body: updates ifprize.c caller to match new un_803063D4 signature
raw_diff: un_803063D4() changed to un_803063D4(0, 0, 0)

naming_conventions.convention: Address-style names such as un_803060BC, un_803063D4, un_804D6EC4, and un_804A26B8 remained in use where semantic names were not proven.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: toy.c retains multiple un_ address-style function and data names
decomp_standards: conservative-naming

naming_conventions.convention: Small local role names appear where roles are clear, including gobj, fp, jobj, table, ptr, list, idx, and state.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftKb_SpecialNMs_8010BC90 uses Fighter* fp and Fighter_GObj* gobj
raw_diff: toy.c functions use state, jobj1, jobj2, table, ptr, list, idx

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered ty-specific type names used in the slice include TyModeState, ToyAnimState, ToyEntry, TrophyData, TyViewData, TyDisplayData, TyLightData, TyListData, and TyListArg; review questioned some shared-header names/layouts, so they should not be treated as globally validated by this intake alone.
evidence_refs: review_comments: types.h questions ToyAnimState, ToyEntry, TrophyData, trophyTable, trophyCount justification
raw_diff: toy.c local typedefs TyViewData, TyDisplayData, TyLightData
review_comments: tylist.c hunk includes TyListData and TyListArg

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use narrow typed overlays on global state to replace raw field offsets where the layout is locally understood.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: TyViewData and ((TyViewData*) un_804D6E6C)->x4 in un_803102C4
review_comments: tdisplay.c TyModeState feedback

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Preserve a pointer-walk or table-copy shape when matching stack/table behavior, as shown in un_803109A0 copying un_803B8910 into a local ToyEntry table and walking entries.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_803109A0 copies table from un_803B8910 to stack and uses pointer walk

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use recovered dispatch structure such as switch(field) for table field lookup when it expresses the function logic and matches.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: un_803060BC uses switch(field) returning TrophyData fields

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Some code in the diff still used gotos, byte-offset pointer arithmetic, casts, and a forced stack-frame pad; review comments show these tactics needed cleanup or justification, not automatic acceptance.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Trophy_SetUnlockState uses byteOffset and (u8*) table pointer math
raw_diff: un_803114E8 includes s32 pad[0x20] /* Force larger stack frame */
review_comments: tylist.c asks about casts and says fix pointer math

notes: The PR body claims 14 fully matched functions and 15 improvements, while the loaded bot report excerpt shows 10 new matches and 19 improvements at one report point; this intake preserves both as evidence without reconciling final verifier status.
The loaded raw diff and review_comments files are truncated, so later hunks and final post-review edits may be missing from this slice.
Review comments identify concerns and requested cleanup, but the slice does not prove exactly which comments were resolved in final code.
Struct layouts and field meanings added in types.h are evidence of PR changes, not proof that those names/layouts should become accepted global facts without curator review.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed state access was preferred over M2C_FIELD/pointer math in ty review
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR #2072, reviewers pushed trophy/ty code away from M2C_FIELD and raw pointer math toward TyModeState or extractable structs where layouts were known. This is PR-grounded support for the existing typed-fields-over-pointer-math standard.
evidence_refs: review_comments: tdisplay.c TyModeState comment
review_comments: tylist.c fix all pointer math
review_comments: tylist.c extract struct question

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header type expansions need explicit justification
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2072 review questioned confidence for new ty/types.h structs and Toy fields, showing that recovered shared types should come with evidence such as repeated accesses, table sizes, callsites, or data layout support rather than only a matching diff.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r2675506992
review_comments: discussion_r2675508106

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use inlined strings for tylist archive/string accesses when available
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2072 review asked tylist string accesses to be fixed to use the inlined string instead of raw string offset access.
evidence_refs: review_comments: discussion_r2679124345
review_comments: discussion_r2679124452

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR-backed example for typed-fields-over-pointer-math from tylist/tydisplay
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2072 can serve as an example that trophy/ty code should prefer TyModeState or extracted structs over M2C_FIELD and raw byte pointer math when the layout is known or recoverable.
evidence_refs: review_comments: tdisplay.c TyModeState feedback
review_comments: tylist.c fix all pointer math
review_comments: tylist.c extract struct question
source_update_candidates.reason: This is already aligned with an existing standard, but curator may want a concrete PR example.

source_update_candidates.title: Add PR-backed example for keeping string accesses inline
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2072 review asked tylist string accesses to use the inlined string, reinforcing that raw string-table offsets or generated symbol-style accesses should be cleaned up when source-level literals are identifiable.
evidence_refs: review_comments: PsiLupan string-access comments
source_update_candidates.reason: This supports existing literal/string standards with trophy-module review evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: ty trophy module matching touched toy, tylist, tyfigupon, and shared ty headers
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2072 is evidence that trophy-module matching work in src/melee/ty commonly spans toy.c, tylist.c, tyfigupon.c, toy.h, tylist.h, tyfigupon.h, tydisplay.h, and types.h, with cross-file caller updates possible when signatures are recovered.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl
pr_body: trophy module files and ifprize.c caller update
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoping aid for future trophy/ty matching, but should be curator-reviewed before becoming a path fact.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the PR body's '14 functions' claim as a final verified match ledger without full final regression or objdiff evidence; loaded bot report excerpt shows a different intermediate count.
Do not promote ToyAnimState, TrophyData, trophyTable, or trophyCount meanings as accepted global type facts from this slice alone, because review explicitly asked for justification.
Do not infer reviewer intent beyond the written comments; the slice shows requested cleanup but not final resolution for every comment.
Do not treat forced stack padding, gotos, byte pointer arithmetic, or casts in the diff excerpt as accepted style; review and standards mark these as tactics needing evidence or cleanup.
